title: Pass 5.B.5: ferrotorch-data transforms Normalize/RandomCrop/RandomHorizontalFlip CPU readback
description:
Pass 4 finding (umbrella #982) — ferrotorch-data audit, GPU_CPU_MISMATCH bucket (3 findings).

src/transforms.rs:147-184, 280-318, 347-410 — Normalize, RandomHorizontalFlip, RandomCrop all unconditionally call input.data() (host pull) and TensorStorage::cpu(output). CUDA tensor is silently downloaded, transformed on CPU, returned as CPU. No is_cuda() guard or NotImplementedOnCuda error (compare interop.rs which guards correctly).

Acceptance:
- Migrate transforms to device-resident ops, OR
- Gate by is_cuda() and Err NotImplementedOnCuda
- Discriminating test asserting result.is_cuda() preserved when input is CUDA.
- Bundle: collate.rs:18-25 default_collate doc claim about cross-device check is unverified at this layer (separate sub-finding).
